arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to Real Madrid or Man City? The state of play
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are preparing for Xabi Alonso's 2025 departure, according to German media. At least that is according to Sky Germany, which reports that Leverkusen bosses are preparing for life after Alonso.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen 'resigned to losing Xabi Alonso next summer' with two European heavyweights 'keen' on making the Spaniard their next manager… including top Premier League side
arts.sum: The 42-year-old's current deal with the German side ends at the end of the 2025-26 season but is expected to leave in the coming summer, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Man City targeting Xabi Alonso as he prepares for move months after Liverpool snub
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso turned down the chance to leave Bayer Leverkusen in the summer when former club Liverpool were looking to replace Jurgen Klopp, having just won the Bundesliga title

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen planning for Xabi Alonso’s departure
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Bayer Leverkusen are already planning for the departure of their head coach, Xabi Alonso. Over the summer, Bayern Munich attempted to lure Alonso away from the…
